name: build-lynx-apps
description: Build Lynx.js app surfaces and bundles with official global Lynx tooling routes, Lynx-native UI guidance, visual concept workflows, and optional app-service integration guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Build Lynx app surfaces with official global tooling routes, Lynx-native UI, and visual QA guidance
interface.longDescription: Use Build Lynx Apps to create and improve Lynx.js app surfaces, pages, projects, and bundles from image-generated concepts, route framework truth to globally installed official Lynx Docs and DevTool MCPs, compose UI with read-only @dumbooks/lynx-ui guidance, and optionally plan Stripe or Supabase/Postgres app-service integrations without UI-framework assumptions. This plugin does not vendor or recreate the official Lynx AI skills or MCP servers; install those globally from the official Lynx sources. Complete native, mobile, desktop, or web host applications require the host integration path documented by official Lynx resources.
defaultPrompt: Build a polished Lynx.js app surface with official-doc routing, Lynx guardrails, and visual/runtime checks.
